title: Apples++
body:
# Apples++

**Iron Apple**  
**_Gives Resistance 2 for 15 seconds. Also removes any Weakness and Mining Fatigue._**

---

**Diamond Apple**  
**_Gives Strength and Haste for 15 seconds. Also reduces max health to 5 hearts for 15 seconds._**

---

**Netherite Apple**  
**_Gives Strength 2, Haste 2, Slowness 2, and Resistance 2 for 15 seconds. Also gives Blindness for 5 seconds._**

---

**Notch Apple**  
**_Gives Speed 5 and Resistance 4 for 15 seconds. Also gives Nausea for 10 seconds._**

---

**Copper Apple**  
**_Spawns Lightning when eaten. Gives Poison for 3 seconds and Absorption 10 for 15 seconds._**

---

**Raw Iron Apple**  
**_Gives Resistance for 7 seconds. Removes any Weakness and Mining Fatigue._**

---

**Raw Gold Apple**  
**_Gives Regeneration for 2.5 seconds, Absorption for 50 seconds, and Hunger 2 for 15 seconds._**

---

**Raw Copper Apple**  
**_Exactly like Copper Apple, but gives Hunger 2 for 15 seconds._**

---

**Orange Apple**  
**_Regular food source._**

---

**Red Carrot**  
**_Regular food source._**

---

**Saddelmet**  
**_If worn by a player, other players can mount themselves onto them._**

---

**Apple on a Stick**  
**_If held when riding a player, the player automatically starts walking in that direction._**

---

**Apple Ingot**  
**_Used to make Apple Nuggets and Apple Sword. Can be eaten like regular food source._**

---

**Apple Nugget**  
**_Used to craft Apple Ingot, otherwise useless. Can be eaten like regular food source._**

---

**Apple Sword**  
**_Is a sword, slightly better attack damage than wooden swords but very low durability. Can also be eaten._**

---

**Bucket of Apple**  
**_Place down apple juice. If standing in Apple Juice, you become sticky for 1 minute. Every block would act like honey blocks while sticky._**

---

**Lapis Apple**  
**_Enchants a random item from your inventory, or increments the enchant level by 1._**

---

**When-you-don't-have-enough-gold-and-you-use-some-lapis-instead Apple**  
**_Decreases an enchant level by 1 on a random item, or takes the enchant away if 1 level. Removes 5 xp levels if nothing is enchanted in inventory._**

---

**Pineapple**  
**_Regular food source._**

---

**Overpriced Apple**  
**_Drains 5 apples from your inventory whenever a day passes. If you don't have minimum 5 apples, you die._**
